// note: Compiles the Three-Point Shootout (web/src/*.ts) to web/dist/*.js via tsgo. The pure-TS engine now lives in the shared spine package @axiom/web-engine (no wasm); it resolves to that package's source for typecheck, and the emitted JS keeps the bare specifier, inlined by the packager (gallery) or resolved by the import map in index.html (dev). Tests (*.test.ts) are excluded — they run under `node --test` with native TS type-stripping (no DOM), so they need no compile here.
